text: Fanɛ asa libi fɛɛ anansɛ, nɛnɛ nɩɩ fɛn taalɛ tɔwɛ ɩmʋ nɩɩ ɩ bʋrɔn, yɛgɛ fanɛ atɔ waasa gyɛ alibi? Lɩɩ fɛɛ kʋtɔ mʋ nɩɩ kɩ bʋ nyɩmɩsa kɔkɔlɔ tɔ mʋ, kɩmʋ ɩɩ lɩɩ mʋ kɔnɔ tɔ.
translated: When the story of Anansi the spider was told, people would gather together in the evening, and they would ask, "Why is the drum beaten at that time?" They said that the drum was used to summon the people to come, so that they would gather around the fire.
